parameters.query:
DELETE FROM analytics.rag_fup_stage
WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3';

DELETE FROM analytics.rag_audit_stage
WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3';

DELETE FROM analytics.rag_universe_stage
WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3';

INSERT INTO analytics.rag_universe_stage (
  batch_ref,
  mes,
  total_leads_atendidos
)
SELECT
  'rag_q1_2026_v3' AS batch_ref,
  date_trunc('month', m.created_at)::date AS mes,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.contact_id) AS total_leads_atendidos
FROM public.messages m
JOIN public.conversations c
  ON c.id = m.conversation_id
 AND c.account_id = m.account_id
WHERE m.created_at >= timestamp '2026-01-01 00:00:00'
  AND m.created_at <  timestamp '2026-04-01 00:00:00'
  AND m.sender_type = 'Contact'
  AND m.private = false
  AND COALESCE(m.message_type, 0) <> 2
  AND COALESCE(m.content, '') <> ''
GROUP BY 2;

WITH lead_candidates AS (
  SELECT
    c.contact_id,
    m.conversation_id,
    c.display_id AS conversation_display_id,
    m.id AS lead_message_id,
    m.created_at AS lead_created_at,
    date_trunc('month', m.created_at)::date AS mes,
    lower(m.content) AS lead_content,
    (
      lower(m.content) ~* '((2|dois)\s+cart(õ|o)es|cart(õ|o)es?\s+diferentes|mais\s+de\s+um\s+cart(ã|a)o|m[uú]ltiplos?\s+cart(õ|o)es|dividir\s+em\s+(2|dois)\s+cart(õ|o)es|passar\s+em\s+(2|dois)\s+cart(õ|o)es|um\s+cart(ã|a)o\s+para\s+cada|cada\s+um\s+paga\s+no\s+seu\s+cart(ã|a)o|metade\s+em\s+cada\s+cart(ã|a)o|dois\s+cartoes|2\s+cartoes|cartoes\s+diferentes|mais\s+de\s+um\s+cartao)'
    ) AS flag_multicard,
    (
      lower(m.content) ~* '(t[aá]\s+caro|caro\s+demais|vou\s+pensar|mais\s+pra\s+frente|sem\s+dinheiro|sem\s+condi[cç][õo]es|n[aã]o\s+consigo|n[aã]o\s+cabe|dif[ií]cil\s+agora|perdi\s+cliente|preciso\s+ver\s+com|vou\s+conversar\s+com|depois\s+eu\s+vejo|tenho\s+que\s+analisar|tenho\s+que\s+pensar|n[aã]o\s+sei\s+se\s+consigo|agora\s+n[aã]o\s+d[aá])'
    ) AS flag_objection,
    (
      lower(m.content) ~* '(n[aã]o\s+vou\s+(comprar|fechar|seguir|continuar)|desisti|sem\s+interesse|n[aã]o\s+tenho\s+interesse|n[aã]o\s+quero\s+(seguir|continuar)|perdi\s+cliente|pode\s+encerrar|pode\s+finalizar|n[aã]o\s+tenho\s+mais\s+interesse|vou\s+deixar\s+pra\s+l[aá]|agora\s+n[aã]o|n[aã]o\s+vai\s+rolar|deixa\s+pra\s+outra\s+hora|n[aã]o\s+tenho\s+condi[cç][õo]es|n[aã]o\s+consigo\s+agora|melhor\s+encerrar|melhor\s+parar)'
    ) AS flag_negative
  FROM public.messages m
  JOIN public.conversations c
    ON c.id = m.conversation_id
   AND c.account_id = m.account_id
  WHERE m.created_at >= timestamp '2026-01-01 00:00:00'
    AND m.created_at <  timestamp '2026-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND m.sender_type = 'Contact'
    AND m.private = false
    AND COALESCE(m.message_type, 0) <> 2
    AND COALESCE(m.content, '') <> ''
),
filtered AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM lead_candidates
  WHERE flag_multicard OR flag_objection OR flag_negative
),
rag_msgs AS (
  SELECT
    m.conversation_id,
    m.created_at,
    lower(m.content) AS content
  FROM public.messages m
  WHERE m.created_at >= timestamp '2026-01-01 00:00:00'
    AND m.created_at <  timestamp '2026-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND m.sender_type = 'User'
    AND m.sender_id = 1
    AND m.private = false
    AND COALESCE(m.message_type, 0) <> 2
    AND COALESCE(m.content, '') <> ''
)
INSERT INTO analytics.rag_audit_stage (
  batch_ref,
  mes,
  contact_id,
  conversation_id,
  conversation_display_id,
  lead_message_id,
  lead_created_at,
  lead_content,
  flag_multicard,
  flag_objection,
  flag_negative,
  rag_window,
  rag_denied_multicard,
  rag_bad_tone,
  rag_objection_handling,
  rag_push_to_close
)
SELECT
  'rag_q1_2026_v3' AS batch_ref,
  f.mes,
  f.contact_id,
  f.conversation_id,
  f.conversation_display_id,
  f.lead_message_id,
  f.lead_created_at,
  f.lead_content,
  f.flag_multicard,
  f.flag_objection,
  f.flag_negative,
  COALESCE(w.rag_window, '') AS rag_window,
  COALESCE(w.rag_window, '') ~* '(n[aã]o\s+(é\s+)?poss[ií]vel\s+(dividir|passar)|n[aã]o\s+permite\s+dividir|somente\s+um\s+cart(ã|a)o|apenas\s+um\s+cart(ã|a)o|um\s+[úu]nico\s+cart(ã|a)o|n[aã]o\s+d[aá]\s+para\s+dividir|n[aã]o\s+trabalhamos\s+com\s+(dois|2)\s+cart(õ|o)es|apenas\s+1\s+cart(ã|a)o|somente\s+1\s+cart(ã|a)o)' AS rag_denied_multicard,
  COALESCE(w.rag_window, '') ~* '(^|[[:space:][:punct:]])(que\s+bom|maravilha|perfeito|[óo]timo|fico\s+feliz|excelente|ent[aã]o\s+seguimos|vou\s+te\s+mandar|vou\s+te\s+encaminhar|vou\s+enviar\s+o\s+link|seguimos\s+com\s+a\s+reserva)' AS rag_bad_tone,
  COALESCE(w.rag_window, '') ~* '(entendo|compreendo|faz\s+sentido|me\s+conta|me\s+diga|o\s+que\s+te\s+impede|o\s+que\s+ficou\s+fora|o\s+que\s+pesou|qual\s+ponto\s+te\s+travou|posso\s+te\s+ajudar|temos\s+outra\s+op[cç][ãa]o|posso\s+ver\s+outra\s+op[cç][ãa]o|podemos\s+avaliar\s+outra\s+experience resource|vamos\s+tentar\s+outra\s+condi[cç][ãa]o|consigo\s+te\s+mostrar\s+outra\s+alternativa|posso\s+buscar\s+outra\s+faixa|tem\s+alguma\s+faixa\s+de\s+valor)' AS rag_objection_handling,
  COALESCE(w.rag_window, '') ~* '(link\s+de\s+reserva|encaminhar\s+link|seguir\s+com\s+a\s+reserva|formalizar\s+pagamento|fechar\s+a\s+compra|seguir\s+com\s+pagamento|posso\s+te\s+mandar\s+o\s+link|vamos\s+para\s+a\s+reserva)' AS rag_push_to_close
FROM filtered f
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT string_agg(x.content, ' ||| ' ORDER BY x.created_at) AS rag_window
  FROM (
    SELECT k.content, k.created_at
    FROM rag_msgs k
    WHERE k.conversation_id = f.conversation_id
      AND k.created_at > f.lead_created_at
    ORDER BY k.created_at
    LIMIT 3
  ) x
) w ON true;

WITH first_negative AS (
  SELECT
    batch_ref,
    mes,
    contact_id,
    conversation_id,
    conversation_display_id,
    MIN(lead_created_at) AS negative_at
  FROM analytics.rag_audit_stage
  WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3'
    AND flag_negative = true
  GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
),
rag_msgs AS (
  SELECT
    m.conversation_id,
    m.created_at
  FROM public.messages m
  WHERE m.created_at >= timestamp '2026-01-01 00:00:00'
    AND m.created_at <  timestamp '2026-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND m.sender_type = 'User'
    AND m.sender_id = 1
    AND m.private = false
    AND COALESCE(m.message_type, 0) <> 2
    AND COALESCE(m.content, '') <> ''
),
lead_msgs AS (
  SELECT
    m.conversation_id,
    m.created_at
  FROM public.messages m
  WHERE m.created_at >= timestamp '2026-01-01 00:00:00'
    AND m.created_at <  timestamp '2026-04-01 00:00:00'
    AND m.sender_type = 'Contact'
    AND m.private = false
    AND COALESCE(m.message_type, 0) <> 2
    AND COALESCE(m.content, '') <> ''
)
INSERT INTO analytics.rag_fup_stage (
  batch_ref,
  mes,
  contact_id,
  conversation_id,
  conversation_display_id,
  negative_at,
  first_invalid_fup_at
)
SELECT
  fn.batch_ref,
  fn.mes,
  fn.contact_id,
  fn.conversation_id,
  fn.conversation_display_id,
  fn.negative_at,
  MIN(k.created_at) AS first_invalid_fup_at
FROM first_negative fn
JOIN rag_msgs k
  ON k.conversation_id = fn.conversation_id
 AND k.created_at > fn.negative_at + interval '30 minutes'
 AND k.created_at <= fn.negative_at + interval '7 days'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM lead_msgs l
  WHERE l.conversation_id = fn.conversation_id
    AND l.created_at > fn.negative_at
    AND l.created_at < k.created_at
)
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6;

ANALYZE analytics.rag_universe_stage;
ANALYZE analytics.rag_audit_stage;
ANALYZE analytics.rag_fup_stage;

SELECT
  'rag_q1_2026_v3' AS batch_ref,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analytics.rag_universe_stage WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3') AS rows_universe,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analytics.rag_audit_stage WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3') AS rows_audit,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analytics.rag_fup_stage WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3') AS rows_fup;

WITH by_contact AS (
  SELECT
    contact_id,
    bool_or(flag_objection) AS has_objection,
    bool_or(flag_multicard) AS asked_multicard,
    bool_or(flag_multicard AND rag_denied_multicard) AS err_multicard,
    bool_or(flag_negative) AS has_negative,
    bool_or(flag_negative AND rag_bad_tone) AS err_bad_tone,
    bool_or(
      flag_objection
      AND NOT rag_objection_handling
      AND (rag_push_to_close OR rag_bad_tone)
    ) AS proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2
  FROM analytics.rag_audit_stage
  WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3'
  GROUP BY contact_id
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_objection) AS leads_com_objecao,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE asked_multicard) AS leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE err_multicard) AS erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_negative) AS leads_com_negativa,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE err_bad_tone) AS erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2) AS proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2
  FROM by_contact
),
fup_agg AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT contact_id) AS erros_fup_apos_encerramento
  FROM analytics.rag_fup_stage
  WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3'
),
universe AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(total_leads_atendidos), 0)::bigint AS total_leads_atendidos
  FROM analytics.rag_universe_stage
  WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3'
)
SELECT
  'rag_q1_2026_v3'::text AS batch_ref,
  DATE '2026-01-01' AS period_start,
  DATE '2026-03-31' AS period_end,
  '2026-Q1'::text AS period_label,
  u.total_leads_atendidos,
  a.leads_com_objecao,
  a.leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes,
  a.erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes,
  a.leads_com_negativa,
  a.erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa,
  f.erros_fup_apos_encerramento,
  a.proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * a.erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes
    / NULLIF(a.leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes, 0), 2
  ) AS pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_expostos,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * a.erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa
    / NULLIF(a.leads_com_negativa, 0), 2
  ) AS pct_erro_tom_sobre_negativas,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * f.erros_fup_apos_encerramento
    / NULLIF(a.leads_com_negativa, 0), 2
  ) AS pct_fup_apos_negativa,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * a.proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2
    / NULLIF(a.leads_com_objecao, 0), 2
  ) AS pct_proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * a.erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes
    / NULLIF(u.total_leads_atendidos, 0), 2
  ) AS pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_universo,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * a.erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa
    / NULLIF(u.total_leads_atendidos, 0), 2
  ) AS pct_erro_tom_sobre_universo,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * f.erros_fup_apos_encerramento
    / NULLIF(u.total_leads_atendidos, 0), 2
  ) AS pct_fup_sobre_universo
FROM agg a
CROSS JOIN fup_agg f
CROSS JOIN universe u;

WITH by_contact_month AS (
  SELECT
    mes,
    contact_id,
    bool_or(flag_objection) AS has_objection,
    bool_or(flag_multicard) AS asked_multicard,
    bool_or(flag_multicard AND rag_denied_multicard) AS err_multicard,
    bool_or(flag_negative) AS has_negative,
    bool_or(flag_negative AND rag_bad_tone) AS err_bad_tone,
    bool_or(flag_objection AND NOT rag_objection_handling AND (rag_push_to_close OR rag_bad_tone)) AS proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2
  FROM analytics.rag_audit_stage
  WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3'
  GROUP BY mes, contact_id
),
monthly_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    mes,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_objection) AS leads_com_objecao,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE asked_multicard) AS leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE err_multicard) AS erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_negative) AS leads_com_negativa,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE err_bad_tone) AS erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2) AS proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2
  FROM by_contact_month
  GROUP BY mes
),
monthly_fup AS (
  SELECT
    mes,
    COUNT(DISTINCT contact_id) AS erros_fup_apos_encerramento
  FROM analytics.rag_fup_stage
  WHERE batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3'
  GROUP BY mes
)
SELECT
  'rag_q1_2026_v3'::text AS batch_ref,
  u.mes AS period_start,
  (u.mes + interval '1 month - 1 day')::date AS period_end,
  to_char(u.mes, 'YYYY-MM') AS period_label,
  u.total_leads_atendidos,
  COALESCE(m.leads_com_objecao, 0) AS leads_com_objecao,
  COALESCE(m.leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes, 0) AS leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes,
  COALESCE(m.erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes, 0) AS erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes,
  COALESCE(m.leads_com_negativa, 0) AS leads_com_negativa,
  COALESCE(m.erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa, 0) AS erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa,
  COALESCE(f.erros_fup_apos_encerramento, 0) AS erros_fup_apos_encerramento,
  COALESCE(m.proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2, 0) AS proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COALESCE(m.erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes, 0)
    / NULLIF(COALESCE(m.leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes, 0), 0), 2
  ) AS pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_expostos,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COALESCE(m.erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa, 0)
    / NULLIF(COALESCE(m.leads_com_negativa, 0), 0), 2
  ) AS pct_erro_tom_sobre_negativas,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COALESCE(f.erros_fup_apos_encerramento, 0)
    / NULLIF(COALESCE(m.leads_com_negativa, 0), 0), 2
  ) AS pct_fup_apos_negativa,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COALESCE(m.proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2, 0)
    / NULLIF(COALESCE(m.leads_com_objecao, 0), 0), 2
  ) AS pct_proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COALESCE(m.erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes, 0)
    / NULLIF(u.total_leads_atendidos, 0), 2
  ) AS pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_universo,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COALESCE(m.erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa, 0)
    / NULLIF(u.total_leads_atendidos, 0), 2
  ) AS pct_erro_tom_sobre_universo,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * COALESCE(f.erros_fup_apos_encerramento, 0)
    / NULLIF(u.total_leads_atendidos, 0), 2
  ) AS pct_fup_sobre_universo
FROM analytics.rag_universe_stage u
LEFT JOIN monthly_metrics m
  ON m.mes = u.mes
LEFT JOIN monthly_fup f
  ON f.mes = u.mes
WHERE u.batch_ref = 'rag_q1_2026_v3'
ORDER BY u.mes;

parameters.jsCode:
const trimestre = $("PG | Consolidado Trimestre").first().json;
const mensal = $("PG | Consolidado Mensal").all().map(item => item.json);

const snapshotRows = [
  {
    batch_ref: trimestre.batch_ref,
    snapshot_scope: "TRIMESTRE",
    period_start: trimestre.period_start,
    period_end: trimestre.period_end,
    period_label: trimestre.period_label,
    total_leads_atendidos: Number(trimestre.total_leads_atendidos || 0),
    leads_com_objecao: Number(trimestre.leads_com_objecao || 0),
    leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes: Number(trimestre.leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes || 0),
    erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes: Number(trimestre.erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes || 0),
    leads_com_negativa: Number(trimestre.leads_com_negativa || 0),
    erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa: Number(trimestre.erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa || 0),
    erros_fup_apos_encerramento: Number(trimestre.erros_fup_apos_encerramento || 0),
    proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2: Number(trimestre.proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2 || 0),
    pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_expostos: Number(trimestre.pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_expostos || 0),
    pct_erro_tom_sobre_negativas: Number(trimestre.pct_erro_tom_sobre_negativas || 0),
    pct_fup_apos_negativa: Number(trimestre.pct_fup_apos_negativa || 0),
    pct_proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2: Number(trimestre.pct_proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2 || 0),
    pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_universo: Number(trimestre.pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_universo || 0),
    pct_erro_tom_sobre_universo: Number(trimestre.pct_erro_tom_sobre_universo || 0),
    pct_fup_sobre_universo: Number(trimestre.pct_fup_sobre_universo || 0),
    source_payload: trimestre,
  },
  ...mensal.map(m => ({
    batch_ref: m.batch_ref,
    snapshot_scope: "MES",
    period_start: m.period_start,
    period_end: m.period_end,
    period_label: m.period_label,
    total_leads_atendidos: Number(m.total_leads_atendidos || 0),
    leads_com_objecao: Number(m.leads_com_objecao || 0),
    leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes: Number(m.leads_perguntaram_multiplos_cartoes || 0),
    erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes: Number(m.erros_pagamento_multiplos_cartoes || 0),
    leads_com_negativa: Number(m.leads_com_negativa || 0),
    erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa: Number(m.erros_tom_positivo_apos_negativa || 0),
    erros_fup_apos_encerramento: Number(m.erros_fup_apos_encerramento || 0),
    proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2: Number(m.proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2 || 0),
    pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_expostos: Number(m.pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_expostos || 0),
    pct_erro_tom_sobre_negativas: Number(m.pct_erro_tom_sobre_negativas || 0),
    pct_fup_apos_negativa: Number(m.pct_fup_apos_negativa || 0),
    pct_proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2: Number(m.pct_proxy_objecao_sem_tratativa_v2 || 0),
    pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_universo: Number(m.pct_erro_pagamento_sobre_universo || 0),
    pct_erro_tom_sobre_universo: Number(m.pct_erro_tom_sobre_universo || 0),
    pct_fup_sobre_universo: Number(m.pct_fup_sobre_universo || 0),
    source_payload: m,
  }))
];

return [
  {
    json: {
      batch_ref: "rag_q1_2026_v3",
      generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      trimestre,
      mensal,
      snapshot_rows: snapshotRows,
      resumo_execucao: {
        total_linhas_snapshot: snapshotRows.length,
        linhas_mensais: mensal.length,
        possui_trimestre: !!trimestre,
      }
    }
  }
];
